title: Input Guardrails Execution
interaction_flow: Runner → split guardrails: sequential_guardrails = [g for g if not g.run_in_parallel], parallel_guardrails = [g for g if g.run_in_parallel]
run_input_guardrails → asyncio.as_completed(tasks): iterate results as they finish
run_input_guardrails → run_single_input_guardrail(agent, guardrail, input, context): InputGuardrailResult
InputGuardrail.run → guardrail_function(context, agent, input): GuardrailFunctionOutput (sync or async)
[tripwire=True] → cancel all remaining tasks, gather(return_exceptions=True), attach SpanError, raise InputGuardrailTripwireTriggered(result)
Runner → proceed to model call (agent never started during sequential guardrail run)
Runner → asyncio.create_task(run_input_guardrails_with_queue(agent, guardrails, input, context, streamed_result, parent_span))

[tripwire=True] → streamed_result.input_guardrail_results += guardrail_results, streamed_result._triggered_input_guardrail_result = result, queue.put_nowait(result), cancel all tasks, attach SpanError to parent_span, break
key_data_objects: InputGuardrail: {guardrail_function: Callable, name: str|None, run_in_parallel: bool=True}
SpanError: {message: str, data: {guardrail: str, type: str}}
key_relationships: run_input_guardrails delegates_to run_single_input_guardrail via asyncio tasks
InputGuardrail.run invokes guardrail_function (user-provided, sync or async)

execution_modes.sequential_blocking: run_in_parallel=False; guardrail runs and completes BEFORE model call; tripwire prevents agent from ever starting; cost-safe
execution_modes.parallel_concurrent: run_in_parallel=True (default); guardrail runs concurrently with model call; tripwire cancels agent mid-execution; best latency
execution_modes.streaming_queue: run_input_guardrails_with_queue used in streaming mode; results pushed to asyncio queue for downstream consumption

tripwire_logic: Each InputGuardrailResult.output.tripwire_triggered is checked as results complete (asyncio.as_completed)
First tripwire hit: cancel all remaining guardrail tasks immediately
Attach SpanError to tracing span (parent_span or current span)
Streaming: set streamed_result._triggered_input_guardrail_result, put result in queue, break loop
Guardrails only run for first agent in chain (turn==1)
tracing: guardrail_span(guardrail.get_name()) opened per guardrail in run_single_input_guardrail
span_data.triggered = result.output.tripwire_triggered recorded on span close
SpanError attached to parent_span or current_span on tripwire
important_notes: Input guardrails only run on turn 1 (first agent). run_in_parallel=True is default. Both sync and async guardrail functions are supported (inspect.isawaitable). Sequential guardrails must all pass before model starts. The streaming queue (put_nowait) enables real-time guardrail result consumption during streaming.
